skills.name: Compose Email
skills.description: Compose and send a new email
skills.task: Click 'Compose' button, fill 'To' field with '${to}', fill 'Subject' with '${subject}', type the body '${body}', then click 'Send'

skills.name: Search Emails
skills.task: Click the search bar, type '${query}' and press Enter

skills.name: Mark All as Read
skills.description: Mark all emails in inbox as read
skills.task: Click the checkbox next to 'Select all', then click 'More options' and select 'Mark all as read'

skills.name: Reply to Current Email
skills.description: Reply to the currently open email
skills.task: Click 'Reply' button in the open email, type '${message}' in the reply box, then click 'Send'
